title: handle_inbox: sig_header and digest_header as owned String when &str suffices
description:
LOCATION: src/server.rs:770-773, 856-862, 884-888

FINDING: sig_header, digest_header, and date_str are each allocated as String via .to_string() from header values that remain valid for the duration of handle_inbox. All three are passed only to functions taking &str (parse_signature_header, strip_prefix, parse_from_rfc2822). The header map lives for the full function lifetime, so &str borrows would work without any owned allocation.

IMPACT: Three unnecessary String allocations on every inbox request that has a valid Signature header. Under load this is measurable heap churn.
close_reason: Documented: comment explains HeaderMap borrow lifetime requires owned String
